< Flats and textures
  Flats and textures [view]
SRB2 levels Single Player: GFZ • THZ • DSZ • CEZ • ACZ • RVZ • DCZ • GEZ • ERZ
Other: NiGHTS • Mario • Special Stage • Multiplayer • SRB1 Remake
Other themes Caves/Cliffs • Xmas • Disco • Forts • GHZ • HPZ • Ice/Snow • Jungle • Sand • Forest
Miscellaneous Colors • Generic • Old • SA-SRB2 • Miscellaneous • Skies

The following is an exhibit of flats and textures seen in the Green Hill Zone theme, which is commonly used in grasslands and areas based on Green Hill Zone from Sonic the Hedgehog. Sapphire Falls Zone is a notable example of a level in SRB2 that uses this theme.

Base

Flats Textures
GHZFLR07 GHZWAL06
GHZFLR0C GHZWAL07
GRASS2 GHZWALL6
GRASS3 GHZWALL7
GRNLITE1 GHZWALLC
GRSWALL


Rocks

Flats Textures
GATE2 GHZWAL01
GHZROCKF GHZWAL08
GHZWALL1

Totem poles

Flats Textures
DEM1_6 GHZWAL03
GHZFLR09 GHZWAL05
GHZWAL09
GHZWALL3
GHZWALL5
GHZWALL8
GHZWALL9

Bridges

Flats Textures
GHZBRDG1 GHZWAL02
GHZBRDG2 GHZWAL04
GHZBRDG3 GHZWAL11
GHZBRDG4 GHZWALL2
GHZFLR02 GHZWALL4
GHZWALLA
GHZWALLB
